title: Huawei eKitOptiX F1002-AC-H1 optical enterprise gateway, uplink BOB
description: Huawei eKitOptiX F1002-AC-H1 is a powerful enterprise optical gateway designed for reliable, high-speed data transmission in medium and large networks â ideal for hotels, schools, office buildings, and modern enterprise infrastructures The device combines advanced features and extensive connectivity options, effortlessly handling heavy loads while providing a flexible and scalable network architecture Supports up to 256 ONUs/optical APs and up to 1000 connected devices â perfect for high-density environments 10G uplink + 8Ã GE ports â high throughput and fast data transfer without compromise Automatic Wi-Fi configuration for optical APs â centralized management and seamless roaming (802.11k/v support) IPsec VPN support with hardware encryption â maximum network data security Plug-and-play installation and automatic service detection â easy deployment without complex setup Multiple uplink modes â XGS-PON, XG-PON, or 10GE SFP with WAN/LAN multiplexing Comprehensive Layer 3 support â routing, port forwarding, VLANs, IPv6, DHCP, NAT, firewall, and more Advanced QoS and multicast management â ensures stability and service quality even under heavy network load 1Ã uplink port XGS-PON / XG-PON (SC/UPC) - BOB - BOSA on Board, GPON module is on the board 1Ã uplink 10GE SFP port (WAN/LAN multiplexing) 4Ã GE ports (WAN/LAN multiplexing) 4Ã GE LAN ports (LAN5âLAN8, shared 1 Gbit/s bandwidth) 2Ã downlink GPON/XGS-PON Combo ports (SFP) 1Ã USB 3.0 port Huawei eKitOptiX F1002-AC-H1 is an excellent choice for anyone seeking a highly reliable, secure, and flexible…
